tool_purpose: Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-en-fr is a translation model that translates English text to French using the Hugging Face Transformers library. It is based on the OPUS dataset and uses a transformer-align architecture with normalization and SentencePiece pre-processing. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Translation. API call: translate('input_text', model='Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-en-fr').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-en-fr is a translation model that translates English text to French using the Hugging Face Transformers library.
